project: Make It Rain Digital — MIRD AI Corporate Machine

screens.name: Login
screens.description: Primary login screen for Marcus and agents to authenticate into the RainMachine Dashboard.

screens.name: Login Error
screens.description: Login screen displaying inline error after failed authentication attempt.

screens.name: Forgot Password
screens.description: Email input screen for initiating a password reset.

screens.name: Password Reset Email Sent
screens.description: Confirmation screen shown after reset email is dispatched.

screens.name: Set New Password
screens.description: Form for entering and confirming a new password, accessed via the reset link in email.

screens.name: Password Updated
screens.description: Success confirmation after a password has been successfully reset. Auto-redirects to login after 3s.

screens.name: Session Expired
screens.description: Full-screen interstitial shown when the user session token expires mid-use. Auto-redirects to login.

screens.name: Welcome to RainMachine
screens.description: First-time user welcome screen shown after initial login before any data is populated.

screens.name: Team Setup — Add Agents
screens.description: Guided step for Marcus to add his agent roster.

screens.name: Lead Routing Setup
screens.description: First-time configuration of lead routing rules.

screens.name: Notification Preferences
screens.description: First-time notification preferences — email vs. SMS.

screens.name: Setup Complete — System Online
screens.description: Completion animation transitioning to main dashboard.

screens.name: RainMachine Dashboard — Home
screens.description: Primary 4-quadrant command center: Lead Acquisition, Pipeline, Agent Performance, Campaign Intelligence, plus Claude AI panel.

screens.name: Dashboard Loading
screens.description: Skeleton shimmer state while dashboard data fetches. Boot sequence animation plays.

screens.name: Dashboard — Awaiting First Data
screens.description: Empty state before campaigns go live. Pulsing MIRD logo.

screens.name: Dashboard — Signal Lost
screens.description: Error state when data feeds fail. Orange panel borders, SIGNAL LOST labels.

screens.name: Lead Acquisition Intelligence
screens.description: Full lead list with filter bar, sortable table or card view, pagination.

screens.name: Lead Intelligence Panel
screens.description: 400px right-side slide-in panel with full lead profile, timeline, AI call summary.

screens.name: Lead Full Profile
screens.description: Full-page expanded view of a single lead.

screens.name: Lead Call History
screens.description: All AI call attempts, outcomes, and full transcripts per connected call.

screens.name: Lead Appointment Detail
screens.description: Appointment date/time, agent, show/no-show outcome, reminder history.

screens.name: Leads — Awaiting Incoming Signals
screens.description: Empty state when no leads exist. JARVIS: AWAITING INCOMING SIGNALS.

screens.name: Leads — No Filter Results
screens.description: Zero results for active filter combination. Reset filters CTA.

screens.name: Reassign Lead Modal
screens.description: Modal overlay for reassigning a lead to a different agent.

screens.name: Agent Performance Overview
screens.description: Summary bar + 2-column agent panel grid + routing toggle.

screens.name: Lead Routing Diagram
screens.description: Visual flow diagram of lead routing from sources to agents.

screens.name: Agent Full Profile
screens.description: Full per-agent page: performance metrics, assigned leads, conversion trend, call log.

screens.name: Agent — Assigned Leads
screens.description: All leads assigned to this agent with stage and last activity.

screens.name: Agents — No Agents Configured
screens.description: Empty state when no agents added yet.

screens.name: Campaign Intelligence
screens.description: Platform switcher, overview panel, campaign table, creative performance grid.

screens.name: Campaign Detail Row
screens.description: Inline accordion with 30-day charts and ad set breakdown.

screens.name: Creative Performance Detail
screens.description: Full creative metrics in modal overlay.

screens.name: Campaigns — No Active Campaigns
screens.description: Pre-connection empty state. JARVIS: NO ACTIVE CAMPAIGNS DETECTED.

screens.name: Campaigns — Platform Signal Lost
screens.description: API failure for Meta or Google data. Partial data still shown.

screens.name: Intelligence Archive
screens.description: 60/40 split: report history list (left) + active report or chat (right).

screens.name: Weekly Intelligence Brief
screens.description: Full Claude-generated weekly report with metadata and follow-up chat below.

screens.name: AI Report Chat
screens.description: Chat history + user query + AI response rendered.

screens.name: AI Processing Query
screens.description: PROCESSING QUERY pulsing dots while awaiting Claude API response.

screens.name: AI Response Error
screens.description: QUERY FAILED inline error with retry option.

screens.name: Intelligence Reports Initializing
screens.description: Pre-7-day empty state. INTELLIGENCE REPORTS INITIALIZING.

screens.name: Settings — Team Management
screens.description: Agent roster table with add/edit actions and invite functionality.

screens.name: Add New Agent
screens.description: Modal: name, email, phone, role. Triggers invite email.

screens.name: Edit Agent
screens.description: Modal: edit agent name, contact, role, active/inactive status.

screens.name: Settings — Lead Routing
screens.description: Visual rule builder: IF source + condition THEN assign to agent with method. Drag to reorder.

screens.name: Settings — Notifications
screens.description: Toggle rows for all notification types with email/SMS/both options.

screens.name: Settings — Integrations
screens.description: Platform connection status cards: Meta, Google Ads, GMB, CRM. Last sync, reconnect options.

screens.name: Reconnect Meta Ads
screens.description: Guided Meta token re-verification flow within settings context.

screens.name: Reconnect Google Ads
screens.description: Guided Google Ads re-connect flow within settings context.

screens.name: Settings — Account & Billing
screens.description: Client account details, package tier, invoice history, billing support.

screens.name: Page Not Found
screens.description: JARVIS-style 404. NAVIGATION TARGET NOT FOUND. Link to dashboard.

screens.name: System Fault
screens.description: SYSTEM FAULT — DIAGNOSTIC IN PROGRESS. Auto-retry with countdown.

screens.name: System Maintenance
screens.description: Planned downtime notice with return ETA and contact info.

screens.name: CEO Dashboard Login
screens.description: Isolated login for Shomari. High-security context with 2FA.

screens.name: Two-Factor Authentication
screens.description: 6-digit 2FA code entry after successful password auth.

screens.name: CEO Login Error
screens.description: Failed auth with lockout countdown if max attempts reached.

screens.name: CEO Session Expired
screens.description: Full-screen session expiry interstitial. Auto-redirects to CEO login.

screens.name: MIRD Command Center
screens.description: 30-minute CEO loop home. North Star bar, alert tray, 2x2 dept grid, client health grid. Live clock.

screens.name: Alert Investigation
screens.description: Alert context: client, metric, % change, flagging agent, timestamp. CTA to client detail.

screens.name: Dismiss Alert
screens.description: Confirm alert dismiss with required note. Logs dismissal with timestamp.

screens.name: All Clients
screens.description: Full expanded client health grid. Sortable by health, MRR, risk, name.

screens.name: Client Detail — Overview
screens.description: Single client deep dive. CPL 30-day trend, pipeline funnel, quick stats, notes.

screens.name: Client Detail — Campaigns
screens.description: Read-only campaign data for this client in CEO context with margin visibility.

screens.name: Client Detail — Leads
screens.description: Read-only lead list for this client in CEO context.

screens.name: Client Detail — Timeline
screens.description: Chronological log of all client activity: AI actions, human, auto, alerts.

screens.name: Client Detail — Financials
screens.description: Invoice history, contract, MRR value, renewal date, gross margin, payment status.

screens.name: Dept 1 — Growth & Acquisition
screens.description: Calls booked trend, DBR pipeline, outbound volume, close rate trend.

screens.name: Prospect Detail
screens.description: Individual DBR prospect: company, contact, last outreach, stage, estimated MRR, next action.

screens.name: Dept 2 — Ad Operations
screens.description: Cross-client campaign health, CPL distribution, clients at risk, AI call metrics.

screens.name: Dept 3 — Product & Automation
screens.description: Onboarding queue, time-to-live, n8n uptime, workflow count, automation errors.

screens.name: Client Onboarding Status
screens.description: Per-client onboarding tracker: step completion, blockers, time elapsed, action options.

screens.name: Workflow Health Monitor
screens.description: n8n workflow status board: run counts, success/error rates, error log viewer.

screens.name: Dept 4 — Financial Intelligence
screens.description: 12-month MRR chart, aggregate metrics, P&L per client table, 90-day forecast (3 scenarios).

screens.name: Client P&L Detail
screens.description: Inline 6-month financial history for a single client in the P&L table.

screens.name: Autonomous Department Activity Log
screens.description: All 4 agent daily logs, expandable by department. Timestamped, color-coded action types.

screens.name: Department Agent Full Log
screens.description: Full expanded log for a single department agent with all metadata and downloadable log.

screens.name: Agent Log History
screens.description: Date-picker to view historical agent logs. Calendar navigation, daily summaries.

screens.name: CEO Settings
screens.description: Settings hub: Alert Thresholds, Notifications, System Health, Account tabs.

screens.name: Alert Threshold Configuration
screens.description: Numeric threshold config per alert type: CPL spike %, churn triggers, onboarding stall time.

screens.name: CEO Notification Preferences
screens.description: Alert delivery method (Slack, email, SMS), daily digest timing, urgency levels.

screens.name: CEO — Page Not Found
screens.description: CEO-context JARVIS-style 404 with command center link.

apps.name: Client Onboarding Portal
apps.primaryUser: New Client (Marcus — first use, one-time flow)

screens.name: Validating Access Link
screens.description: Token validation loading screen with MIRD logo pulse.

screens.name: Access Link Expired
screens.description: ACCESS TOKEN EXPIRED. Instructions to contact MIRD for new link.

screens.name: Desktop Recommended
screens.description: Soft mobile-to-desktop suggestion. Not a hard block. Dismissable.

screens.name: Step 1 — System Initialization
screens.description: Welcome screen: client name, 5-step overview, contract details, checkbox, name field, BEGIN SETUP CTA.

screens.name: Step 1 — Contract Details Wrong
screens.description: Inline contact support panel for incorrect contract details. No navigation away.

screens.name: Step 1 — Progress Restored
screens.description: Returning user progress restoration banner. Auto-advances to last-saved step after 2s.

screens.name: Step 2 — Mission Parameters
screens.description: Business info form: name, markets, audience, transaction value, ad spend, goal, notes.

screens.name: Step 2 — Form Validation Errors
screens.description: Inline validation errors for missing/incorrect fields. Orange error text per field.

screens.name: Step 2 — Saving Progress
screens.description: Transitional save state with scan-line animation. SAVING MISSION PARAMETERS.

screens.name: Step 2 — Save Failed
screens.description: Server save failure. SAVE FAILED — DATA NOT TRANSMITTED. Retry CTA. Data retained locally.

screens.name: Step 3 — Meta Ads Integration
screens.description: Guided 3-sub-step Meta setup: open manager, add system user, paste token, verify.

screens.name: Step 3 — Verifying Meta Token
screens.description: Scanning animation on token input while Meta API call validates.

screens.name: Step 3 — Meta Ads Connected
screens.description: META ADS CONNECTED — SYSTEM USER ACTIVE in green. Progress bar advances.

screens.name: Step 3 — Meta Token Not Recognized
screens.description: TOKEN NOT RECOGNIZED error. Input cleared. Help section auto-expands.

screens.name: Step 3 — Meta Setup Help
screens.description: Expanded help section: video walkthrough, screenshot guide, FAQ, support button.

screens.name: Step 3 — Progress Saved
screens.description: PROGRESS SAVED — YOUR LINK REMAINS ACTIVE FOR N DAYS. Email reminder option.

screens.name: Step 4 — Google Integration
screens.description: Two-part: Google Ads Customer ID + invite status check; GMB search + selection + invite.

screens.name: Step 4 — Checking Google Invite
screens.description: Async invitation acceptance check. Not a spinner — manual re-check button.

screens.name: Step 4 — Google Ads Connected
screens.description: GOOGLE ADS CONNECTED success state. GMB section revealed.

screens.name: Step 4 — GMB Business Search
screens.description: Loading state while GMB Places API returns autocomplete results.

screens.name: Step 4 — GMB Select Business
screens.description: Selectable list of GMB results with business name, location, rating, type.

screens.name: Step 4 — GMB Not Found
screens.description: Empty GMB search result. Retry or skip GMB (Google Ads only required).

screens.name: Step 4 — GMB Business Selected
screens.description: Selected business card shown with invite instruction and GMB status indicator.

screens.name: Step 5 — Launch Configuration
screens.description: 3 file drop zones (logo, photos, videos), launch date picker, notes, notification pref, SMS number.

screens.name: Step 5 — Uploading Assets
screens.description: Per-file progress bars. TRANSMITTING ASSETS. Overall progress indicator.

screens.name: Step 5 — Upload Failed
screens.description: Per-file error: UPLOAD FAILED — FILE TOO LARGE or UNSUPPORTED FORMAT. Retry per file.

screens.name: Step 5 — Missing Required Fields
screens.description: Inline validation when logo or launch date missing. Orange field errors.

screens.name: RainMachine Initializing
screens.description: Full-screen completion. Logo expands/glows. 0→100% progress bar 3s. Timeline with real dates. Calendar CTA.

screens.name: Completion — What Happens Next
screens.description: Scroll section with build timeline, launch expectation, first lead timeline, dashboard link.

screens.name: Setup Already Complete
screens.description: Re-entry state for completed onboarding. SETUP COMPLETE — YOUR RAINMACHINE IS BEING BUILT.

screens.name: Contact Support
screens.description: Modal on any wizard step. Support email, phone, hours. Message input with step context.

screens.name: Video Walkthrough
screens.description: Video embed lightbox for Meta setup help. New tab or modal.

designSystem.aesthetic: JARVIS HUD — dark, holographic panels, geometric grid background, pulse animations
